title: release binding correction v2
outOfScope: Any adopter project or installed runtime repository
Starting or reordering any planned Work Item
Changing application behavior or enterprise security/compliance claims
Deleting prior immutable Work Item evidence

sources.reason: Corrective release-binding Contract for the template repository.
Defines the fail-closed source-tree and archive binding that exposed the post-merge mismatch.
Public release archive digest projection for v0.5.39.
Frozen normalized source identity and archive digest.
Candidate release evidence binding for release.json.

rawUserRequest: 修复发布前置暴露的冻结绑定问题；只修改模板工程，不启动或跳过任何计划内工单；完成 PR、合并、ai-close-work-item、清理分支、同步默认分支后，再确认 v0.5.39 发布。

declaredIntent.summary: Rebind the frozen v0.5.39 release metadata to the merged template default branch without changing planned Work Item order or adopter projects.

riskAssessment.reason: Only release metadata and frozen evidence projections change; no adopter or runtime files are in scope.

executionDecision.reason: User authorization covers corrective template release binding, PR, merge, closure, and publication verification.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: Merged default branch has a different source identity than the pre-merge freeze
Only template repository paths are modified
Release evidence remains owned by this corrective Contract/Summary

preReviewWarnings: Check final origin/main source identity, deterministic archive digest, release evidence ownership, and template/adopter boundary.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: The final origin/main normalized sourceTree and deterministic archive SHA are recomputed from the merged template tree.
release.json, release-freeze.json, and release-digests.json agree with those recomputed values.
PR checks pass and the corrective branch is merged, closed, deleted, and default-branch synchronized before publication.
The release workflow publishes v0.5.39 and independent verification confirms tag, asset SHA256, source commit, and clean checkout.
guidelines: Keep template release evidence separate from adopter runtime state.
Do not modify planned Work Item order or prior immutable evidence.

intent.problem: The release freeze was calculated before the final post-archive evidence binding commit, so the merged template default branch no longer matched its frozen sourceTree and archive digest.
constraints: This is a corrective release-binding Work Item, not a planned Work Item and must not change plan order.
Only the template repository is in scope; adopter and installed object projects are excluded.
Complete the full PR, merge, ai-close-work-item, branch cleanup, and default-branch synchronization lifecycle before release.
intent.rationale: Rebinding the frozen metadata to the actual merged template tree preserves fail-closed publication while keeping the plan and Work Item history explicit.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: The user explicitly authorized template governance/release corrections, PR, merge, cleanup, and release confirmation.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
